node.statement: 1 in A and A is a real linear subspace of V=B(H)_sa. By GT-Pprops, P(1)=1, so 1=P(1) in Im P=A (def-near-fixed-algebra), giving 1 in A. By GT-Pprops, P is real-linear on B(H)_sa, so its range A=Im P is a real linear subspace of V=B(H)_sa (image of a real-linear map is a real subspace). Thus A is a real linear subspace of V containing the unit 1. Uses GT-Pprops, def-near-fixed-algebra.
